results.title: From Editor’s Desk – June2026
results.description: As we gather in Mumbai for the landmark 10th Anniversary Edition of the Exhibition Excellence Awards & Summit, I am filled with immense pride and gratitude for the remarkable journey our industry has undertaken over the years. EEA 2026 represents far more than an awards ceremony. It is a celebration of resilience, innovation, leadership, and the collective spirit that powers the exhibition, events, and MICE [...]
